title: Carlos + Dispenza Toronto Saturday Session
description: Reach out to Carlos directly. Offer Sacred Songbook Heart Coherence as a 10-minute opener to their Saturday morning group. Already donate music to coherence healing groups — this is a natural extension. One ask, hundreds of warm meditators who trust Craig.

title: Dispenza Media Team Presentation
description: Not cold outreach — a reconnection. Craig has Joe's testimonial, a 10-year relationship, and licensed music in their world. Ask for 20 minutes with their media or events team to show what's been built. Even a newsletter mention to their list = thousands of perfectly aligned leads.

title: Tristan Truscott / Satori Method — Founding Practitioner Deal
description: Already in motion. Close it. His certified instructor cohort becomes founding practitioners. He becomes first real affiliate. His community = instant warm audience across breathwork and movement. Offer: 35% commission, founding practitioner status.

title: Personal 1:1 Founding Member Invites
description: Not a mass email — a voice note or personal DM to 20-30 specific people Craig respects. 'I built something and I want you to be one of the first 111.' People respond to personal asks in a completely different way than a broadcast.

title: 498-Person Email List — Reactivation Sequence
description: Already emailed once. Build a 3-part sequence: (1) the story of what was built, (2) a live demo video, (3) the founding offer close. Not promotional — personal. Christine manages the sends.

title: Founding Practitioner Cohort Identity
description: Create a named group: 'SessionCraft Founding Practitioners.' 20-30 people get 90 days free + lifetime affiliate commission (35%). Public recognition on the platform. Give it a name, a badge, a moment. People want to belong to something at the beginning.

title: Practitioner Advisory Board
description: 5-7 key names from different modalities — one from yoga, one breathwork, one sound healing, one somatic/movement, one meditation. Not a governance board — credibility + network. Each one co-promotes to their audience. Their name on the site = social proof that converts practitioners.

title: Weekly Drop-In Heart Coherence Session
description: Christine or Scottie hosts via Zoom every Tuesday at 12pm. Uses Sacred Songbook live. Free. 10 minutes. No sales pitch. Builds community, generates organic testimonials, and creates a weekly content asset. Record every one.

title: 'Build Your First Playlist' Onboarding Cohort
description: Live group walkthrough for new practitioners signing up for SessionCraft. Scottie runs it. Reduces churn, creates connection, generates testimonials. Run it biweekly when there's a batch of new signups.

title: Music Therapy Associations (CAMT — Canada)
description: The Canadian Association of Music Therapists has registered members who are literally paid to use music in clinical and wellness settings. A sponsored email or webinar to their list = the most credentialed audience. Also check American Music Therapy Association (AMTA).

title: YouTube Shorts — Sacred Songbook Heart Coherence Captures
description: Screen record a real Heart Coherence session. No narration required — just the visual + music. 60 seconds. Post 10 of these in a week and let the algorithm work. This is one afternoon of work with Scottie.

title: 'Behind the Session' YouTube Series
description: Craig shows the real workflow: open Voice, record a track, export. Authentic, unscripted, 5-10 minutes. Not a tutorial — a window into creative process. This builds trust with practitioners who want to see it working before they commit.

title: Facebook Live — Live Heart Coherence Demo
description: Facebook following is warm and real. Go live for 10 minutes. Do a Heart Coherence session using Sacred Songbook on screen. No pitch. Just do it. Post the replay as evergreen content. This one move could generate the first 20 signups.

title: @sessioncraft Instagram — Practitioner Stories
description: Christine manages this. One post format only: practitioner feature. 'How [Name] uses SessionCraft in their [yoga/breathwork/meditation] practice.' Rotate through founding practitioners. Real faces, real use cases.

title: @craigyoungmusic Instagram — Music + Sacred Songbook Experience
description: Personal account. Short clips of actual music from Sacred Songbook. No selling. Just the experience. 'This is what I made this morning.' Audio-first content on a visual platform stands out.

title: Free Webinar: 'How to Add Sound to Your Practice'
description: Targeted to yoga, breathwork, and meditation facilitators. Craig teaches for 40 minutes. Christine + Scottie support. Ends with the founding practitioner offer. Run this monthly until there are 100 practitioners. Primary top-of-funnel event.

title: Virtual Sound Summit — One-Day Online Event
description: 5-6 founding practitioners each do a 20-minute live demonstration using SessionCraft or Sacred Songbook. Each one brings their own audience. Co-marketed. Free to attend, paid upgrade to founding membership. Bigger lift but massive reach in one day.

title: Live Demo at Existing Wellness Event
description: No need for own event. Ask to do a 10-minute demo at any local yoga studio, breathwork gathering, or wellness workshop. Live, in-person, Sacred Songbook + Heart Coherence = people feel it immediately. One room can generate 10 signups.

title: Wellness Podcast Guest Appearances
description: The story is legitimately compelling: 10-year Dispenza relationship, 50+ tracks, built three platforms, music used in coherence healing groups. Target 5-10 podcasts in the meditation/sound healing/yoga space. Each appearance = their entire audience exposed to the platforms.

title: Strategic Influencer Partnerships (3-5 People)
description: Not spray-and-pray. Identify 3-5 wellness influencers (50k-500k followers) already talking about meditation, coherence, or sound healing. Personal outreach, free account, no obligation. 'Try it, tell me what you think.' Authentic use over paid posts.

title: Wellness Association Newsletter Sponsorships
description: Many yoga, breathwork, and sound healing associations have newsletters with highly targeted audiences. A sponsored feature — not an ad — is often $200-500 and reaches exactly the practitioners you want. Much better ROI than broad social ads.

title: Practitioner Referral Program with Unique Codes
description: Every practitioner gets a unique code. When someone signs up with their code, they earn 35% recurring commission. 'SATORI50' goes to Tristan's cohort. 'TORONTO30' goes to Carlos's group. Personalized codes create belonging, track source, and give practitioners a reason to share.

title: #HeartCoherenceChallenge
description: 5-day free challenge. Day 1: free access to Sacred Songbook Heart Coherence. Daily email with a reflection prompt. Social share mechanic: post your experience with the hashtag. Christine and Scottie run the whole thing. Builds email list and creates user-generated content.

title: Corporate Wellness Programs
description: Companies are spending heavily on employee wellness. SessionCraft Voice could be pitched as a tool to create custom guided meditations for corporate teams. One corporate client = dozens of individual users + meaningful revenue. Start with 5 companies where there's an existing relationship.

title: Ontario Interns Under Scottie and Christine
description: University co-op students (music therapy, marketing, psychology, communications) placed through programs at Humber, Mohawk, or McMaster. Low cost or government-subsidized. Tasks: social content batching, outreach admin, community management, YouTube editing. 2 interns = 40 hours/week of execution capacity.

title: Product Hunt Launch (SessionCraft Voice)
description: Product Hunt (producthunt.com) is a free website where software launches to 100k+ early adopters. A well-executed launch drives 2,000-10,000 visitors in 24 hours and generates press. The 'Create your first meditation free' hook is perfect for their audience. Scottie manages logistics: build the product page, recruit supporters to upvote on launch day.

title: Spotify for Artists Bio + Sacred Songbook Link
description: Update Spotify for Artists profile (artists.spotify.com) — bio field + website URL field. Clickable link for 1,000+ monthly listeners. Same in Apple Music for Artists. One line: 'Sacred Songbook — music for meditation, coherence, and healing.' + URL. Do this today.
